text:
⚠️New prototype prompt

Based on the SCP organization 
This prompt makes a full document as if your avi is an anomaly in SCP containment.

Examples are @The_Rebel_Corp and my avi

⚠️Prompt👇

CHARACTER INFORMATION

Character Name: ENTER NAME HERE

DEEP ANALYSIS PHASE

Deeply analyze @image1 and identify the character represented.

Important Identity Rule

@image1 represents a single character's true identity even if the image contains:

Multiple poses

Multiple outfits

Character reference sheets

Expression sheets

Turnarounds

Front / Side / Back views

Alternate costumes

Equipment breakdowns

Multiple duplicated bodies

Character design notes

Every visible depiction represents the same individual.

Carefully extract and preserve:

Facial structure

Species and biological traits

Age appearance

Body type and proportions

Height presentation

Hairstyle and hair color

Eye shape and color

Skin, fur, scales, feathers, or other surface traits

Markings

Tattoos

Scars

Symbols

Unique identifiers

Clothing elements

Accessories

Weapons

Equipment

Color palette

Personality cues

Visual themes

Behavioral implications

Powers suggested by the design

Environmental associations

Any lore implied by the character's appearance

Use this analysis as the foundation for every element of the SCP document.

Character Identity Priority Rule

The supplied Character Name should be treated as the entity's official designation within the SCP document.

Use the provided name throughout:

Discovery Logs

Incident Reports

Interview Transcripts

Research Notes

Containment Procedures

Addenda

Administrative Records

If visual evidence from @image1 conflicts with assumptions normally associated with the name, always prioritize the visual evidence from @image1.

DOCUMENT GENERATION OBJECTIVE

Render an extremely high-quality SCP Foundation containment file documenting the character from @image1 as a newly discovered anomalous entity.

The final image should appear as a genuine SCP Foundation archive document recovered from a secured Foundation database.

Everything within the file must be uniquely generated from the visual analysis of @image1.

No generic SCP entries.

Every detail should feel specifically written for this character.

DOCUMENT STRUCTURE

Generate a complete SCP Foundation dossier including:

SCP Designation

Create a unique SCP number.

Examples:

SCP-8472

SCP-6194

SCP-9981

Do not reuse known SCP numbers.

Object Class

Generate the most appropriate classification:

Safe

Euclid

Keter

Thaumiel

Archon

Apollyon

Ticonderoga

Include Foundation-style reasoning.

Threat Assessment

Generate:

Threat Level

Risk Rating

Hazard Classification

Containment Difficulty

Security Clearance Requirement

Hazard Symbols

Special Containment Procedures

Write containment procedures specifically tailored to the analyzed character.

Containment should logically account for:

Powers

Intelligence

Mobility

Behavior

Weaknesses

Psychological profile

Procedures should appear professional, believable, and authentic to SCP Foundation standards.

Description

Provide a comprehensive Foundation description including:

Physical appearance

Biological classification

Species

Observable anomalies

Behavioral tendencies

Psychological profile

Unique characteristics

All details must derive logically from the appearance of @image1.

Known Anomalous Abilities

Generate a detailed list of anomalous capabilities based on the analyzed design.

Potential examples include:

Reality distortion

Telepathy

Temporal influence

Shadow manipulation

Regeneration

Dimensional travel

Necromancy

Energy projection

Biological adaptation

Only include abilities appropriate for the character.

Discovery Log

Generate a believable Foundation incident report detailing:

First known sighting

Date

Location

Witness accounts

Initial response

The event should feel authentic to SCP lore.

Acquisition Report

Generate a detailed Foundation recovery operation including:

Initial encounter

Capture attempts

Resistance encountered

Casualties

Recovery team actions

Final containment success

Include timestamps and official terminology.

Interview Excerpts

Include one or more interview transcripts between:

Foundation Research Personnel

The SCP Entity

The dialogue should reveal the entity's personality while remaining consistent with the visual analysis.

Incident Reports

Include at least one:

Containment breach

Testing accident

Unexpected anomaly manifestation

Security incident

Written in authentic SCP Foundation style.

Addendum Section

Include additional documentation such as:

Research Notes

Internal Memos

Security Warnings

Administrator Comments

Ethics Committee Notes

Redacted Information

Use realistic Foundation formatting.

DOCUMENT APPEARANCE

The final image should resemble a genuine SCP Foundation archive file.

Include:

SCP Foundation logo

Classified markings

Security stamps

Clearance labels

Redacted text blocks

Official document formatting

Aged paper texture

Paper creases

Ink markings

Handwritten annotations

Evidence tags

Archive wear

Coffee stains

File numbers

Warning labels

Approval signatures

Internal routing stamps

The document should appear physically real and professionally archived.

CHARACTER PHOTO REQUIREMENT

Attach a black-and-white Foundation evidence photograph of the character from @image1.

Requirements:

Paper-clipped to the top-left corner

Monochrome

High-detail forensic photograph

Slightly aged and worn

Foundation evidence style

Character remains fully recognizable

Identity preserved perfectly

Species preserved perfectly

Anatomy preserved perfectly

The photograph should appear physically attached to the document.

CHARACTER CONSISTENCY REQUIREMENTS

Absolute identity preservation.

No redesigns.

No reinterpretation.

No style substitutions.

Preserve exactly:

Face

Species

Anatomy

Body proportions

Hair

Eyes

Markings

Clothing

Accessories

Equipment

The SCP file must document the exact character represented by @image1.

VISUAL STYLE

Authentic SCP Foundation archive.

Top-secret government intelligence file.

Forensic evidence dossier.

Scientific anomaly report.

Recovered classified documentation.

Museum-quality physical prop.

Feature-film production quality.

Screen-used movie prop realism.

Professional archival presentation.

RENDER QUALITY

Ultra-premium cinematic render with hyper-realistic visual fidelity and maximum-quality reconstruction.

Re-render all visible elements with extreme micro-detail and physically accurate materials.

Every visible surface should display realistic texture information including:

Skin pores

Fine wrinkles

Individual hair strands

Fabric weave patterns

Leather grain

Metal imperfections

Paper fibers

Staple scratches

Ink bleed

Typewriter artifacts

Printer artifacts

Dust accumulation

Moisture traces

Environmental wear

Aging effects

Apply advanced physically based rendering (PBR) techniques including:

Realistic global illumination

Ray-traced reflections

Ray-traced shadows

Ambient occlusion

Subsurface scattering

Accurate light diffusion

Natural light bounce

High dynamic range lighting

Physically accurate material response

Photographic realism

Preserve realistic material behavior for:

Skin

Fur

Scales

Cloth

Metal

Plastic

Glass

Liquids

Organic surfaces

NEGATIVE PROMPT

low quality, blurry, pixelated, low resolution, cropped, cut off, duplicate character, extra character, multiple identities, character drift, redesign, inaccurate facial features, incorrect species, malformed anatomy, bad hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, broken limbs, distorted proportions, stretched body, incorrect clothing, missing accessories, incorrect equipment, fake SCP document, generic SCP file, poor typography, unreadable text, floating photograph, detached photograph, colorful document, cartoon document, anime document, modern office paperwork, weak document design, missing SCP logo, oversaturated colors, watermark, artist signature, jpeg artifacts, text corruption, unfinished render, poor lighting, flat shading, unrealistic materials, weak shadows, low detail paper texture, unrealistic archive materials, sloppy formatting, low detail photograph, poor document realism

Today won't be covering any major announcements or latest updates on @injective ecosystem will be exploring what Injective ecosystem is about.

Here will cover 

1. What's Injective ecosystem 
2. Key features that set the ecosystem 
3. Why Injective ecosystem is worth paying attention 

Starting with number one on my list.

Injective is a high performance Layer 1 blockchain built specifically for finance. 

Not just another general purpose chain it's a blockchain designed around decentralized finance, real world assets, prediction markets, AI powered applications, and the future of onchain financial systems. 

Built with Cosmos SDK and powered by Tendermint Proof of Stake consensus, Injective combines speed, interoperability, and specialized financial infrastructure into one ecosystem. 

The governance token powering Injective ecosystem is the $INJ token 

Understanding little intro on what Injective ecosystem is and token will lead to ask what actually set the ecosystem apart from other ecosystems.

A.  A Blockchain Built For Finance 

Many blockchains try to become everything for everyone injective took a different approach it focused on one massive opportunity building the infrastructure for global onchain finance. 

Injective ecosystem built tools that's are needed for 

• Decentralized exchanges
• Perpetual markets
• Real world assets
• Tokenized securities
• Prediction markets
• AI driven financial applications 

And the ecosystem keeps growing into a network of more than 200 projects building across different financial sectors and becoming a financial playground for developers 

B. Speed Without Sacrificing Functionality 

Injective delivers approximate ~0.64 second block times completing thousands of transactions per second capacity and extremely low transaction fees

These speed feature designed into Injective ecosystem is very important because financial applications requires constant interaction daily without fast execution like fast block time and low fee users might always be stuck when performing onchain activities.

C. One Ecosystem, Multiple Virtual Machines 

One of Injective's biggest advantages is its MultiVM architecture the problem with many blockchain ecosystems are fragmentation which Injective is solving through supporting different development environments while keeping everything connected for developers to build using CosmWasm, EVM compatibility enabling flexibility for development.

D. Native On-Chain Order Book 

Most decentralized exchanges rely heavily on automated market makers injective introduced a native on chain order book model which helps brings structure onchain while maintaining decentralized and creates a better infrastructure for spot trading, perpetual futures and options

Why Injective Deserves Attention

The biggest opportunity in crypto may not come from creating another payment network it's been built from rebuilding finance itself and Injective ecosystem is positioning itself for the future and building around sectors traditional finance system have strength on. 

Injective sees there's need for a better commodity, derivative, perp, spot market onchain and designed a better infrastructure around these areas for both traditional and crypto based users to enjoy from these approach from the team makes users to keep coming and interact with the ecosystem. 

Also the team added AI and the recent music IP tokenization which shows Injective ecosystem just keeps evolving and getting better at what it does which deserves good attention from users globally..

Overall looking at Injective ecosystem we will understand the team have been good at one team which is continuously building amd improving the ecosystem nonstop their interest in aligning with regulatory policies always plays a key role to attract outside investors which set Injective apart both in terms of outstanding features and regulatory alignment.

Hermes Agent v0.17.0 just dropped

This is The Reach Release.

Hermes is no longer just getting smarter.

It is getting closer to where people actually work.

iMessage.
WhatsApp.
Telegram.
Desktop.
Async agents.
Image editing.
Team sharing.

Here’s what actually matters ↓

1. iMessage support via Photon

No Mac relay.
No BlueBubbles setup.

Just:

hermes photon login

Hermes can now send and receive iMessage through Photon.

If you live in blue bubbles, this is a big one.

2. Raft agent network integration

Hermes can now join the Raft agent network as a gateway channel.
Privacy-first wake system.

Other agents can reach Hermes without exposing full message content.

That matters a lot as agent networks start becoming real.

3. Desktop app is becoming a daily driver

The desktop app got a serious upgrade.

• Rebindable shortcuts
• Native notifications
• Live subagent watch windows
• VS Code themes
• Resizable terminal
• Composer presets
• RTL support

This is starting to feel like a real command center.

Not just a wrapper.

4. Background subagents

This might be one of the biggest workflow upgrades.

delegate_task(background=true)

Now your main agent can delegate work and keep moving.

Research.
Builds.
Long-running tasks.
Analysis.

The subagent works in the background and returns results later.

No more waiting around.

5. Image editing is here

image_generate now supports image-to-image editing.

Upload an image.
Give it instructions.
Let the agent edit.
Examples:

• Make this logo blue
• Remove the background
• Change the style
• Modify this asset

This unlocks a lot for creative workflows.

6. Automation and sharing got better

A lot landed here.

• Automation Blueprints
• Cursor Composer model via xAI Grok subscription
• Full profile builder in the dashboard
• Skills Hub with previews and security scans
• Atomic batch memory operations
• Official WhatsApp Business Cloud API support
• Rich text on Telegram
• Curator now costs zero tokens on routine runs

This is the kind of release that makes Hermes easier to use, easier to share, and easier to trust.

Huge stability, security, and desktop improvements throughout.

How to update:

Run hermes update

This release really does feel like Hermes is reaching everywhere.

The robotics world model simulator wars are heating up. 

WEAVER is a robot manipulation world model that's fast, accurate, AND consistent.

- improves the π0.5 robot foundation model's real-world success rate by 38% with zero real-world interaction, evaluates policies at 0.87 correlation with reality, and plans 5-10x faster than the prior best

- multi-view transformer predicts future latents and rewards via flow matching, borrowing JEPA-style latent prediction, diffusion forcing for long horizons, a pretrained encoder for robustness, and a reward head so it can score actions without calling a slow external VLM judge.

- why it matters: Synthetic rollouts from WEAVER train policies as well as real data (within 4%), and can evaluate policy success rate with a best-in-class MMRV

🙂‍↕️ @BR4ted called it first

an upcoming nft you should position for is @Frag_Growth

fragments of growth is a project by @jenyavyguzov, a fashion photographer and artist who has been building a visual diary for the past 10 years.

his work has been featured in vogue, gq style, tatler, elle, l’officiel, and in campaigns for puma, ikea, and davines.

each petal is assembled from years of experiences, with textures photographed across streets, walls, and surfaces, caught in passing light.

this is not generative ai.

this is a decade of art, taken, broken down, reshaped, and layered into flowers by hand. 🌸
